calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 bias_head_baseline MINT -- order-independent reuse insurance for the V3-EXQ-742 OFF arm (724-A0 all-ON; D0+D3; baseline)
items.note: Separate baseline mint for the MECH-457 actor-critic ON/OFF lineage's reusable OFF arm (bias_head_baseline = 724-A0 all-ON incompetence control), banked ORDER-INDEPENDENTLY of V3-EXQ-742. Both this mint and the 742 consumer build the OFF cell + its fingerprint from the ONE shared module experiments/_lib/baselines/exq742_mech457_bias_head_baseline.py (run_off_cell + off_path_config_slice), include_driver_script_in_hash=False on both sides -> arm_fingerprint MATCHES by construction (verified: reuse-lookup key 4c316086... identical consumer-vs-mint). PINNED ree-cloud-4 (linux-x86_64-py3.10) so the fingerprint is the reusable cloud machine-class (a Mac mint would be a dead-on-arrival different class). LOW priority (5) so real science preempts. experiment_purpose=baseline, claim_ids=[] -> excluded from governance scoring; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING. A future MECH-457 iteration cites this run_id via reuse_baseline_from to skip re-training the byte-identical OFF arm. Corrects the parent session's initial wrongly-skipped separate mint (terminality unknowable; first-of-lineage is the paradigm mint case). Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-12.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg H-credit (credit-assignment axis): prioritized backward credit replay vs sparse, z_world + raw 5x5, diagnostic
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 1/5 (credit-assignment axis). Consumer of failure_autopsy_MECH-457-fanout-751-750_2026-07-14 fanout_recommendation, grounded in targeted_review_action_learning_bootstrap_class_choice/SYNTHESIS.md (credit class = TOP composition pick). Tests whether |TD-error|-prioritized reverse-replay backward credit assignment (Mattar&Daw 2018 / Foster&Wilson 2006; RL-native homolog of hippocampal backward_credit_sweep MECH-290) lifts unsupervised forage above the 751 RND novelty plateau (5.22) toward BC 32.72. Rollout/exploration byte-identical to the 742 sparse baseline; ONLY the update changes -> NOT a power-bump (new mechanism = new EXQ). Runs on BOTH z_world(cotrain) AND raw 5x5 view as SEPARATE reuse-eligible arms (mechanism housed in experiments/_lib/mech457_explorer_classes.py -> substrate-hashed) for the INV-088 750 retest + future reuse. Sparse baseline same-run both reps (OFF/floor ref + drift guard). DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from governance scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending. Re-derive brake does NOT fire (0 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory on MECH-457). Cloud-pinned for linux-x86_64-py3.10 reuse-eligible mints. Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-14.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg H-return (memory/frontier axis): Go-Explore archive + return vs sparse, z_world + raw 5x5, diagnostic
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 2/5 (memory/frontier axis). Tests whether a Go-Explore archive of discretized position cells + deterministic return-to-frontier via env.reset_to (Ecoffet 2021) lifts unsupervised forage above the 751 RND plateau (5.22) by fixing the detachment that makes RND abandon the frontier every episode. Exploration otherwise identical to sparse -> NOT a power-bump. BOTH z_world(cotrain) AND raw 5x5 view as separate reuse-eligible arms; sparse baseline same-run both reps. DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. MECH-457 candidate/v3_pending. Re-derive brake does NOT fire. Cloud-pinned for reuse-eligible mints. Smoke PASS (archive fired, returns=2) + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-14.

items.title: MECH-457/INV-088 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg H-curriculum (teaching-signal axis): goal-frontier IMGEP/AMIGo-lite vs sparse, z_world + raw 5x5, diagnostic
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 3/5 (teaching-signal axis). Tests whether an IMGEP/AMIGo-lite learning-progress curriculum over goal distance + a goal-conditioned actor-critic (Forestier 2022 / Campero 2021, NO expert) manufactures unsupervised competence approaching BC 32.72 -- the unsupervised analogue of the 748 BC arm. Forage eval selects the goal UNSUPERVISED from the agent's own 5x5 resource_field_view. Tags MECH-457 (build-target class) AND INV-088 (a matched-competent unsupervised curriculum policy on BOTH reps feeds the V3-EXQ-750 representation->diversity retest). BOTH z_world + raw as separate reuse-eligible arms. DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. MECH-457 candidate/v3_pending; INV-088 candidate/pending_substrate_reconfirmation. Re-derive brake does NOT fire. Cloud-pinned for reuse-eligible mints. Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-14.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg H-mode (policy-control axis): critic-utility explore/exploit gate vs fixed-RND, z_world + raw 5x5, diagnostic
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 4/5 (policy-control axis). Tests whether a critic-utility-gated explore/exploit mode scalar (Aston-Jones&Cohen 2005 / Daw 2006) that anneals entropy + the RND coefficient toward greedy exploitation IMPROVES CONSOLIDATION over a fixed-coefficient RND arm run SAME-RUN. The TREATMENT is the gate (a meta-controller OVER exploration), NOT more novelty -> NOT a power-bump; RND is the fixed comparator. Load-bearing DV = mode arm beats fixed-RND by >= 1.0 resource/ep. BOTH z_world + raw as separate reuse-eligible arms; also banks reuse-eligible RND arms on BOTH reps (751 ran z_world RND only). DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. MECH-457 candidate/v3_pending. Re-derive brake does NOT fire. Cloud-pinned for reuse-eligible mints. Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-14.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 PAIR H-credit x H-return (additivity cell): credit + return + pair vs sparse, z_world + raw 5x5, diagnostic
items.note: GOV-FANOUT-1 leg 5/5, the mandated PAIR cell (user directive 2026-07-14: the gap has two plausibly-ADDITIVE halves -- credit-propagation H-credit + frontier-return H-return). Runs H-credit alone, H-return alone, AND the pair SAME-RUN on both reps so additivity/complementarity is directly READABLE, not inferred. Load-bearing DV = pair exceeds the better single by >= 1.0 resource/ep (complementarity), strict majority seeds, clears floor. BOTH z_world + raw as separate reuse-eligible arms; sparse baseline same-run both reps. DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from scoring; routes to /failure-autopsy. MECH-457 candidate/v3_pending. Re-derive brake does NOT fire. Cloud-pinned for reuse-eligible mints. Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-14.

items.title: MECH-092 quiescent-E3 SWR-equivalent replay selectivity (wall-independent functional signature)
items.note: GOV-CONFIRM-1 wall-INDEPENDENT confirming probe for MECH-092 (quiescent E3 cycles trigger hippocampal SWR-equivalent replay). Read-only functional-signature DV driven through the real production path (act_with_split_obs -> _do_replay -> hippocampal.replay) on an UNTRAINED agent (no training -> wall-independent). Load-bearing falsifiable content: C1 quiescent cycles occur, C2 salient cycles also occur (non-degenerate contrast, harm-driven), C3 replay produces real events not a no-op; C4 selectivity. Degenerate substrate self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory, NEVER a false weakens). GOV-REUSE-1: prior MECH-092 manifest (v3_exq_136, 2026-03-29) measured a DIFFERENT readout (downstream consolidation benefit, wall-bound consequence reading; no substrate_hash) -> decisive triggering-signature readout absent -> run; supersedes nothing. Single-arm (multi-seed, no OFF arm) -> no arm_fingerprint / no baseline mint. Sibling of the MECH-303 detector-precision probe (V3-EXQ-760). QUEUE_ID collision: parallel session took 760 -> took 761. Mac full-scale inline validation PASS/supports (min_quiescent/seed=26, min_salient/seed=3, replay_n=5.0, quiescent_fire=1.0, salient_fire=0.0, nonE3_fire=0.0); cloud run authoritative.

items.title: MECH-046 CeA mode_prior context-conditioning (wall-independent functional-signature confirm)
items.note: GOV-CONFIRM-1 wall-INDEPENDENT confirming experiment for MECH-046 (CeA analogue writes a mode prior into the SalienceCoordinator from fast salience classification of z_harm_a). First indexed EVIDENCE-class run for a claim scoring exp_conf 0.0 / genuine_exp_count 0. Drives the REAL CeAAnalog (built on the use_cea_analog=True ON-path config, honouring the V3-EXQ-688 arming caveat) action-free across graded harm/threat contexts; DV = the cea_mode_prior scalar injected into a REAL SalienceCoordinator, read back. PASS = mode_prior PRESENT under threat AND cross-context RANGE varies (load-bearing) MONOTONE in threat load AND near-SILENT in the safe context AND WRITTEN faithfully into the coordinator affinity frame (load-bearing) AND BOUNDED by the log-odds cap. Read-only/training-free/no mode-switch behaviour -> wall-independent (precedent 757 confirmed MECH-288/287; 455/447/448 functional DVs PASSED while behavioural baseline monostrategy-locked). Non-vacuity readiness gate asserts the constructed context sweep injects a threshold-spanning, non-degenerate fast-route input using the SAME range statistic C046_varies routes on; below-floor self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory, NEVER a false weakens). GOV-REUSE-1: checked v3_exq_473_sd035_cea_mode_prior -- diagnostic-purpose (non-scoring, WHY exp_conf=0), substrate_hash None (pre-standard, unverifiable), tested presence+coordinator-write+bound at a SINGLE threat point (|z_harm_a|=0.9 -> mode_prior 0.4); decisive context-conditioned RANGE+monotonicity readout absent -> run. Supersedes nothing. Multi-arm (seed x context) reuse-ELIGIBLE fingerprints (pure-arithmetic substrate, no trained OFF arm -> no separate baseline mint). Mac full-scale inline validation PASS/supports (context means safe 0.0 / low 0.15 / mid 0.40 / high 0.70; range 0.70; steps [0.15,0.25,0.30]; readback diff 0.0; max_abs 0.72<=cap 0.8); cloud run authoritative. QUEUE_ID: 761 taken by a parallel session (MECH-092) -> took 762.
